mapper.select: SELECT target_date AS targetDate, SUM(CASE WHEN type = 'INCOME' THEN amount ELSE 0 END) AS totalIncome, SUM(CASE WHEN type = 'EXPENSE' THEN amount ELSE 0 END) AS totalExpense FROM finances WHERE store_seq = ( CASE WHEN #{storeSeq} IS NOT NULL AND #{storeSeq} != 0 THEN #{storeSeq} ELSE (SELECT store_seq FROM stores WHERE user_seq = #{userSeq} ORDER BY store_seq ASC LIMIT 1) END ) AND target_date LIKE CONCAT(#{yearMonth}, '%') GROUP BY target_date ORDER BY target_date ASC
